twc_daily.narrative: Mostly cloudy. Lows overnight in the upper 60s.
Scattered strong to severe thunderstorms. Highs in the low 80s and lows in the low 60s.
Clouds giving way to sun . Highs in the low 80s and lows in the low 60s.
Thunderstorms early. Highs in the low 80s and lows in the low 70s.
Morning showers and thunderstorms. Highs in the mid 80s and lows in the upper 60s.
Afternoon thunderstorms. Highs in the mid 80s and lows in the low 60s.
Thunderstorms developing in the afternoon. Highs in the low 80s and lows in the low 60s.

nws_periods.name: Overnight
nws_periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 4am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 68. South wind around 15 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_periods.name: Friday
nws_periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 83. South wind 10 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_periods.name: Friday Night
nws_periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 4am. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 62. Southeast wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
